action.reasoning: Observation: 10 epochs took ~29 min. Val acc peaked at 0.5770 at epoch 2, then model overfits to noisy labels. Analysis: Both train and val have ~40% noise. The model memorizes noisy labels after epoch 2. Need noise-robust training. Decision: Submit eval for baseline score, then implement better noise-robust approach (cleanlab filtering + retraining on clean subset).
